resources.string:
1. INTRODUCTION
FreshTrack is fully committed to protecting your personal privacy. We believe in absolute user data autonomy and security. This policy outlines how we handle data and specifies the offline-first nature of our application.

2. 100% OFFLINE & LOCAL DATA STORAGE
All notes, household inventory items, categories, and expiry dates are processed and stored purely inside your device's local Room Database. Absolutely NO personal data, tracking metrics, or inventory information is transmitted to, processed by, or stored on external servers or third-party web services. Your inventory list is entirely private to you.

3. DEVICE METADATA & CRASH ANALYTICS
The application does not collect background telemetry. Only when you explicitly submit a feedback or bug report form, the form utilizes secure JavaMail dispatch to transmit your message. In this action, essential non-identifiable technical specifications (such as device model, brand, and operating system version) are included to assist Developer Vivek Jha in diagnosing and fixing bugs. Your email address is strictly used to reply to your inquiry.

4. GOOGLE DRIVE AUTO-BACKUP
FreshTrack utilizes the native Android Auto-Backup framework managed by the Android operating system. This system uploads automated, encrypted application state copies to your personal, private Google Drive storage space. The developer has zero visibility, zero access, and no control over this secure backup data.

5. DATA DELETION, ACCESS & ABSOLUTE CONTROL
You retain 100% ownership and absolute control over all your application data. You can inspect your records at any time. If you wish to wipe all stored information instantly, you can execute the "Reset App Database" action within the settings page or clear the storage in the Android system settings.

1. USAGE AGREEMENT
These terms govern your use of FreshTrack v1.0.0. By using this application, you accept these terms in full. If you disagree with any portion of these terms, you must discontinue using the application.

2. SYSTEM ALARM & NOTIFICATION LIABILITY DISCLAIMER
FreshTrack relies strictly on the native Android operating system scheduler (AlarmManager) to deliver real-time expiry and warning notifications. Please be aware that aggressive OS battery-saving protocols, vendor-specific system optimizers, or device power-offs can restrict, delay, or entirely suppress scheduled alarms. Developer Vivek Jha is legally and financially absolutely free from any liability, loss, or damage arising from missed reminders, neglected alerts, or expired inventory items.

3. DATA LOSS & RECOVERY RISK
Because FreshTrack is designed as a fully local-first offline application, all database storage resides solely within your physical device. If you clear application cache/storage, uninstall the application, lose or damage your physical hardware, or bypass standard Android OS system backups, Developer Vivek Jha cannot recover, reconstruct, or access your data. Users are advised to utilize the backup features regularly to prevent data loss.
Your data stays 100% safe. \'Backup Now\' saves a secure copy to your phone or Google Drive. When you reinstall or reset the app, Android will automatically restore your data if available.
\'%1$s\' is expiring tomorrow (%2$s). Please use it or plan a meal!
\'%1$s\' is expiring in 12 hours. Prepare it soon to avoid food waste!
\'%1$s\' reaches its expiry date today (%2$s). Check its freshness before consuming!
Report bugs, suggest features, or rate the app
Please enter a valid email address
No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
Congratulations! Your %1$s has been sent successfully. Thank you for your feedback!
Device integrity compromised. Unverified operating system or test keys detected.
Active debug monitoring tools or reverse engineering software hook detected.
The signature certificate of this package does not match the official release.

To protect your household inventory database and local private storage, FreshTrack has suspended operation.

Reason: %1$s

Please uninstall this modified copy and obtain the original application from the official source.
Choose how you want to share your shopping list:
Type items above to get started
Are you sure you want to delete this list?
Shopping completed! Data sent to Analytics & Archived.
